title: Industry 1.0
subtitle: The Age of Mechanization
description: The adventure begins and our first destination is the world of industry. So what are you waiting for? Take your seats and enjoy the journey with us.

title: Industry 2.0
subtitle: The Age of Electrification
description: Are you still with us ? Our adventure is still on and we just arrived at our next station : industry 2.0 . It's a new area with marvelous inventions you don't wanna miss : ENJOY !
